rationale: Educ. Code §13.152 governs initiation of school district consolidation by resolution or petition. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Consolidation is initiated in each district proposed to be consolidated by either a resolution adopted by the board of trustees of the district or a petition requesting an election on the question that is signed by the required number of registered voters of the district.
_note: Rule text concerns school district consolidation procedure; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
